since_last: 72% of 89 AI names green; Chip Equipment & AI Hardware leads +3.61%; AI bubble risk 57 Heating Up.

cards.headline: The tape: a broad bid, 72% of AI names green
cards.body: SPX +0.75% · BTC +0.44% · Gold -1.07% · Nasdaq100 +1.36%. 72% of 89 AI names are green — a broad bid. Chip Equipment & AI Hardware is doing the heavy lifting at +3.61%.

cards.headline: Chip Equipment & AI Hardware leads, Applied AI: Industrial, Defense & Vertical lags
cards.body: Strongest AI sector is Chip Equipment & AI Hardware at +3.61%; weakest is Applied AI: Industrial, Defense & Vertical at -2.15%. Rotation within the AI trade, not a one-way move.

cards.headline: HON is the standout at -48.87%
cards.body: Leaders: AMAT +11.06%, KLAC +8.80%, LRCX +8.05%, PANW +7.51%, CRWD +6.05%. Laggards: HON -48.87%, MU -3.51%, INTC -2.14%, AI -1.91%.
cards.watch: Hot means attention, not direction — watch whether the leaders hold the bid or fade into the next session.

cards.headline: SpaceX (SPCX) +1.77% at $155.94
cards.body: The SpaceX debut keeps pulling attention — SPCX is +1.77% this session. The biggest IPO in history remains the tape's attention magnet.

cards.headline: Risk: AI bubble index 57 — Heating Up
cards.body: The composite AI Bubble Index sits at 57/100, led by Valuation at 85. Higher = frothier; the risk is everyone caring at once while valuations are already stretched.
